title: 50 Pcs Black M4 x 25mm Premium Stainless Steel 304 Self Tapping Wood Screws, Phillips Flathead, 4mm, 50 Pieces
features: Threaded bolt size: thread M8, Thread length 16mm. M3, M4, M5 and M6 models are available.

Material: 304 stainless steel. Greater strength and durability. It has a strong and lightweight material that can withstand wear and tear while still rust-free and easy to install. Head type: standard crosshead, quick and time-saving installation. Easy to loosely tighten with a regular screwdriver.
Excellent workmanship: screws are smooth and burr-free, with standard threads and uniform pitch. Save time and increase installation efficiency.
Easy to install: Self-tapping screws are designed to cut their own threads as they are driven into the material, which makes them easy to install without the need for pre-drilled holes.
Versatile: Self-tapping screws are versatile and can be used in a wide range of materials, including metal, plastic, and wood.
description: The advantages of screws: Easy to install: Self-tapping screws are designed to cut their own threads as they are driven into the material, which makes them easy to install without the need for pre-drilled holes. Versatile: Self-tapping screws are versatile and can be used in a wide range of materials, including metal, plastic, and wood. Stronger fastening: Self-tapping screws create a stronger and more secure fastening than regular screws because they create their own threads in the material, which helps to prevent the screw from coming loose over time. Time-saving: Self-tapping screws save time and effort because they eliminate the need for pre-drilled holes or tapping threads. This makes them a popular choice for large-scale projects or for applications where time is of the essence. Cost-effective: Self-tapping screws are often more cost-effective than other fastening methods because they require fewer steps and materials.
